description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn base. The house features a low-pitched, shingled gable roof in gray, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, off-white color. Windows are arranged in a simple, symmetrical pattern on the longer sides, with a mix of small and medium-sized rectangular panes. The main entryway is a plain, open doorway without a visible door, located on the shorter side of the house, and the floor inside appears to be wooden. There are no visible decorative elements, porches, or steps, giving the house a minimalist and functional appearance. The property includes some flat, vertical panels or signs placed near one side, possibly for display or informational purposes.
description: A single-story, rectangular house with a gray gable roof, light exterior walls, and simple, symmetrical windows. The main entry is a plain open doorway on the short side, with a wooden floor visible inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, four windows, and some display panels or signs on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view with a large window and the open entryway, no display panels visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with five windows and a central vent or glass block feature, no entryway visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large window and the open entryway, display panels visible on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Plain open doorway with no visible door, steps, or decorative elements
